# Project Brief

**Generated by:** vforge
**Slug:** landing-page-saas-de-analytics
**Created:** 2026-07-02T04:01:35.594Z

## Original Prompt

landing page SaaS de analytics

## Implementation Spec

**App Type:** Landing page (static marketing website)
**Slug:** landing-page-saas-de-analytics
**Output Path:** /project/landing-page-saas-de-analytics
**Pages:**
- `/` — hero, features, testimonials, pricing, CTA, footer
**Primary Components:**
- `Hero` — headline, subheadline, CTA button, background graphic
- `FeaturesGrid` — 3–6 feature cards with icon, title, description
- `TestimonialsCarousel` — rotating quote cards with avatar, name, role
- `PricingTable` — 3 tier cards (Free, Pro, Enterprise) with feature list
- `CTASection` — final call-to-action banner
- `Footer` — links, social icons, copyright
- `Navbar` — sticky nav with logo, links, CTA button
- `StatsBar` — key metrics (e.g. "10k+ users", "99.9% uptime")
**Data Model:**
- Features: `{ icon: LucideIcon, title: string, description: string }[]`
- Testimonials: `{ name: string, role: string, avatar: string, quote: string }[]`
- Pricing tiers: `{ name: string, price: string, features: string[], highlighted?: boolean }[]`
- Stats: `{ label: string, value: string }[]`
- All data lives in a `lib/data.ts` mock file
**Mocking Policy:** All data is frontend-only static mock arrays. No API calls, no database.
**Interactions:**
- Navbar shrinks on scroll
- Testimonials auto-rotate every 5s with manual dot navigation
- Pricing toggle (monthly/yearly)
- Scroll-triggered fade-in animations (IntersectionObserver or framer-motion)
- Mobile hamburger menu
**Backend/API Needed:** no
**Maps Needed:** no
**Dependencies:**
- `framer-motion` for scroll animations
- Already present: next, react, tailwindcss, lucide-react, typescript, bun
**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Static exportable (`output: export` in next.config or `next build && next export`)
- Responsive down to 320px
- Lighthouse score ≥ 90 on mobile for all categories
- No runtime errors
- Smooth 60fps animations

## Visual Direction

**Visual Concept:** Bold, data-driven sophistication with a dark navy/indigo base, vibrant cyan-teal accent, and generous whitespace. Convey trust and analytical power through clean geometry, subtle glassmorphism surfaces, and judicious data-inspired decoration (grid lines, chart-like motifs).

**Layout System:**
- Single-column with max-w-7xl centered containers
- Full-width alternating sections (light / dark backgrounds)
- Vertical rhythm: 16–24rem section padding
- Content max-width: 72rem for text, full-bleed for hero

**Color Tokens:**
- `--bg-primary: #0B1120` (deep navy, hero/footer)
- `--bg-secondary: #0F172A` (darker sections)
- `--bg-card: rgba(255,255,255,0.04)` (glass card)
- `--accent: #06B6D4` (cyan-500, CTAs, highlights)
- `--accent-glow: rgba(6,182,212,0.3)` (glow effect)
- `--text-primary: #F8FAFC` (headings)
- `--text-secondary: #94A3B8` (body)
- `--text-muted: #64748B` (labels)
- `--border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)` (card borders)

**Typography:**
- Headings: Inter (font-bold), size scale: text-4xl → text-6xl
- Body: Inter (font-normal), text-base → text-lg
- Monospace numbers for stats: font-mono tabular-nums
- Max line length: 70ch for readability

**Components:**
- Navbar: dark glass (`bg-[#0B1120]/80 backdrop-blur-xl`), sticky, logo left, links center, CTA right
- Hero: large gradient text heading, subdued subtext, prominent cyan CTA button with glow hover, subtle animated grid background
- FeaturesGrid: 3-column grid, glass cards with accent top border, centered icon in cyan circle
- StatsBar: 4-column row, huge mono numbers, muted label, subtle divider
- Testimonials: centered card with quote mark decoration, avatar row, dot indicators
- PricingTable: 3-column grid, middle card elevated with accent border and "Popular" badge, checkmark lists
- CTASection: full-width accent gradient background with text overlay and white CTA
- Footer: columns of links, social icon row, copyright, dark background

**Responsive Behavior:**
- Mobile: single column, stacked cards, hamburger nav
- Tablet: 2-column grids where possible
- Desktop: full 3–4 column layouts

**Motion:**
- Framer Motion `fadeInUp` with staggerChildren for sections
- Hero: subtle floating geometric shapes (keyframed y-axis drift)
- Navbar: background opacity transition on scroll
- Pricing: layoutAnimation on toggle
- Testimonials: AnimatePresence crossfade

**States:**
- Buttons: hover (scale 1.02 + brighter), focus (ring-2 ring-accent), active (scale 0.98)
- Links: hover (text-accent), focus (underline)
- Cards: hover (translateY -2px, border-accent/50)
- Mobile menu: slide-in from right with backdrop

**Accessibility Rules:**
- All interactive elements keyboard-focusable with visible ring
- Color contrast ≥ 4.5:1 for text (light text on dark bg passes with #94A3B8 on #0B1120)
- All images have alt text (decorative get alt="")
- Semantic HTML: nav, main, section, footer, h1-h2 hierarchy
- Skip-to-content link
- aria-label on icon-only buttons

**Anti-Slop Checks:**
- No default/ placeholder text outside dev
- No generic stock photos — decorative graphics are CSS/SVG only
- Consistent spacing rhythm (no random margins/padding)
- All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
- No horizontal scroll at any breakpoint

## Working with this project

Open this directory with opencode. The following commands are available:

- `/iterate <prompt>` — evolve or refactor the app.
- `/page <name>` — add a new page.
- `/component <name>` — add a new component.
- `/vforge next` — generate another project.
